# addShortcut(_:)

**Instance Method**

Adds a text-replacement shortcut to the edit dictionary.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func addShortcut(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object calling this method.

## Overview

To present the standard operating system UI for adding text-replacement shortcuts, call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInteraction/addShortcut(forText:from:)] in your implementation of this method.

## Finding and replacing text

- **findSelected(_:)**: Begins a search for the selected content in your browser text view.
- **promptForReplace(_:)**: Shows potential replacements for the selected content.
- **replace(_:)**: Removes the selected text and inputs the chosen replacement text.
